text: Great! I found 6 open PRs with more than 400 additions that don't close any Linear issue. Now let me group them by repository to get the count per repo

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def by-repo (group-by :repo target-prs))\n(def repo-counts (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)]) by-repo))\nrepo-counts"}
